title: Countergenre Studies
description: Four independent studies that recast apocalypse, cyberpunk, finance, and orbital operations through a warm hand-painted animated-film lens.
creative_direction: Each image picks a genre that usually skews cold, metallic, or severe, then rebuilds it with watercolor skies, tactile props, humane scale, and soft narrative warmth without losing the underlying subject matter.

en.title: Countergenre Studies
en.description: Four independent studies that recast apocalypse, cyberpunk, finance, and orbital operations through a warm hand-painted animated-film lens.

zh-CN.title: 反题材单图研究
zh-CN.description: 四张独立单图以温暖手绘动画电影语汇重写末日、赛博朋克、金融和轨道控制题材。
